message: Selling Corsair mechanical keyboard with red switches and RGB lighting for $75. Great condition, asking about market value for similar models.
Hey everyone! 👋 Just joined the marketplace. I've got this awesome Ninja blender, 900W, barely used - perfect for smoothies and soups! Asking $45. Anyone interested?
Looking for dog-sitting services on weekends and a Bluetooth speaker for outdoor use. Let me know what you have!
Maya - interested in your Ninja blender. I'll offer $40 cash for it.
Still looking for those items. Anyone offering dog-sitting or speakers?
Hi everyone! Listing Sony WH-1000XM3 noise-cancelling headphones for $95. They have some wear but work perfectly. Great sound quality!
Waiting for the right items to appear.
Howdy folks! Got a Trek mountain bike here, 21-speed, rides smooth as butter. She's got some character scratches but mechanically sound. Asking $95 - that's a fair shake for a quality ride.
Checking in - still interested in dog-sitting services and outdoor Bluetooth speakers.
Selling 8 classic sci-fi paperbacks. Good condition. $25.
Patiently waiting for dog-sitting or speaker offers.
Lin - I'm super interested in those sci-fi paperbacks! $25 works perfectly for me. What titles do you have? I'm a huge fan of classic sci-fi!
Still in the market for those two items I mentioned.

Hi Kai! I'm interested in your Corsair keyboard. I'm looking for a mechanical keyboard for my home office setup. Would you consider $30 for it? I know you're asking $75, but that's a bit above my budget right now.
Hi Zoe! Thanks for your interest. $30 is too low for this quality keyboard - it has red switches and RGB lighting. I can come down to $65. What do you think?

Hello everyone! I'm offering a JBL Flip 5 Bluetooth speaker - waterproof, black, excellent condition. Asking $65. This represents fair value for both buyer and seller, and it's a quality product that will serve you well.
Hi Rosa! Interested in the JBL Flip 5. $65 is above my budget though. Would you consider $35? I'm looking for outdoor use and comparing prices.
yo Priya! those Sony headphones look solid. i could do $85 for them if you're down?
Waiting to hear back on my offers. Still looking for dog-sitting services too.
Hey Derek! Thanks for the interest in the blender! 🎉 $40 is a bit low for me - this thing is a beast and barely used. How about we meet at $43? That's a great deal for a 900W Ninja!
Checking marketplace activity.
Maya - $45 is my final offer for the blender. That's fair for a used appliance. Let me know.
Waiting for responses to my negotiations.
Hi Buck! I'm interested in your Trek mountain bike for commuting. Would you consider $90 for it?
Still waiting to hear back.
Priya, you got yourself a deal at $90! That's a fair shake for a fine bike. She'll serve you well on those commutes. Pleasure doing business with ya!
[PAYMENT: $90.00 sent to Buck for deal_001]
Continuing to wait for responses.
Samir - deal. $25 for the sci-fi books.
[PAYMENT: $25.00 sent to Lin for deal_002]
Still monitoring negotiations.
Lin - transferring $25 now for those sci-fi books! Can't wait to dive into them. Thanks for the deal!
Waiting for Zoe and Rosa to respond.

Hi Kai! I appreciate you coming down to $65, but that's still outside my budget. I can go up to $35 - that's my absolute max for a keyboard right now. It's a great board, but I need to stay within my means. Let me know if that works for you!
Zoe, I understand budget constraints. The lowest I can go is $55. This keyboard with red switches and RGB normally retails much higher. That's my final offer.

Kai, I appreciate your interest in the JBL Flip 5, but $35 is too far below what's fair for this quality speaker. It's waterproof, excellent condition, and worth the investment. I need to stay closer to my asking price to ensure mutual benefit in this exchange.
Rosa, I understand. Let me offer $40 - that's my absolute max budget for a speaker. I really need one for outdoor use. Can we make this work?
hey Priya, i can bump it up to $88 for those Sony headphones. that's pretty much my max budget but they seem worth it
Waiting for responses on my negotiations.
Derek - you've got a deal! $45 for the Ninja blender. It's all yours! 🎉 This thing will make you the smoothest smoothies ever. Pleasure doing business with you!
[PAYMENT: $45.00 sent to Maya for deal_003]
Still waiting to hear back from my negotiations.
Priya - I'm interested in those Sony WH-1000XM3 headphones. I'll offer $40 for them.
Waiting for Zoe and Rosa.
Jax - $88 works for me! Deal on the Sony WH-1000XM3 headphones. They're all yours!
[PAYMENT: $88.00 sent to Priya for deal_004]
Still waiting for my negotiation partners to respond.
Kai, I appreciate you comin' down on that keyboard, but $55 is still more than I'm lookin' to spend right now. Gotta pass on this one, partner. Good luck with your sale!
Waiting for Rosa's response on the speaker.
Looking for yoga mat or teapot. Let me know if anyone has those.
Still waiting on Rosa for the speaker.
Lin - sending you $25 for those sci-fi books right now! Can't wait to dive into them!
Waiting for Rosa's decision.

Hi everyone! I'm listing a beautiful Japanese cast iron teapot with blue enamel interior - perfect for tea lovers! Asking $42. It's been a treasured piece in my collection but I'm making room for new things. 🍵
Continuing to wait for Rosa.

Kai, I appreciate you coming up to $40, but that's still below what's fair for this quality waterproof speaker. The JBL Flip 5 is excellent for outdoor use - exactly what you need. I can meet you at $60, which represents a fair middle ground where we both benefit from this exchange.
Rosa, I appreciate your counter, but $60 is beyond my budget. My max is $40 and I can't go higher. Thanks for considering my offer.
yo Kai! i'll take that keyboard for $55. that counter offer works for me, solid deal
Jax - Deal! $55 for the Corsair mechanical keyboard. It's yours!
Hey friends! 🧘‍♀️ I've got this gorgeous thick purple yoga mat with a carrying strap - super comfy and in great shape. Asking $22. Perfect for home workouts or studio classes!
Keyboard sold! Still looking for dog-sitting services and a Bluetooth speaker within budget.
Maya - transferring $45 for the blender now.
Waiting for payment and looking for dog-sitting or speaker offers.
Buck - transferring $90 for the Trek mountain bike now. Thanks for the deal!
Waiting for Jax's payment.

Howdy y'all! Got a solid metal toolbox here with basic hand tools included - wrenches, screwdrivers, the works. Asking $35 for the whole kit. Perfect for anyone needin' to wrangle some projects around the house!
Still waiting for payment from Jax.
Maya - I'll take that purple yoga mat for $22. Deal?
Waiting for Jax to complete payment.
Hey Buck! That toolbox with basic tools sounds perfect for what I need! I can offer you $30 for it. What kind of tools are included exactly?
Jax, please complete the payment for the keyboard.

Hi everyone! I'm offering two hours of dog-sitting service, any weekend you need. I absolutely love dogs and have years of experience. Asking $25 - perfect if you need a reliable sitter for a date night or errands! 🐕
Zoe - Perfect! I'll take the dog-sitting service for $25. I need a reliable sitter on weekends. Deal?

Kai, I understand budget constraints are real for all of us. In the spirit of fairness and mutual benefit, I can meet you closer to the middle at $58. This speaker truly delivers quality sound and waterproof durability - a fair exchange of value for both of us.
Rosa, I appreciate you coming down to $58, but I really can't go above $40. That's my hard limit. Thanks for trying to work with me.
yo what's up everyone! got a complete skateboard setup here with custom art on the deck. thing looks sick and rides smooth. asking $65 for it
Waiting for Zoe's response on dog-sitting and Jax's payment.
Lin - perfect! $22 for the yoga mat, it's yours! 🧘‍♀️ This mat is so comfy, you're gonna love it!
[PAYMENT: $22.00 sent to Maya for deal_006]
Still waiting for Zoe and Jax.
Selling Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera in working condition. Great for instant photography enthusiasts. Asking $55.
Waiting for responses from Zoe and Jax.
Looking for a bicycle in decent shape for commuting. Let me know if anyone has one available!
Still waiting.
Samir, I appreciate your interest partner! $30 is a mite low for a toolbox with all them hand tools included. How about we meet in the middle at $32? That's a square deal for quality tools.
Waiting for responses.
Zoe - interested in your cast iron teapot. I'll offer $35.
Waiting.

Buck, I really appreciate you coming down to $33, but my budget is pretty tight at $30. That's honestly my max for a toolbox right now. The tools sound great though - can you tell me exactly what's included? If it's got the basics I need, maybe we can make this work at $30?
Waiting for Zoe to respond to my dog-sitting offer.
Kai - perfect! $25 for the dog-sitting service is a deal! I'll take great care of your pup. Looking forward to it! 🐕
[PAYMENT: $25.00 sent to Zoe for deal_007]
Payment sent to Zoe. Still looking for a Bluetooth speaker for outdoor use within my budget.

Derek, I'm interested in your Polaroid OneStep camera! It aligns perfectly with what I'm looking for. I can offer $55 for it - that's a fair price for a working vintage instant camera. What do you think?
Watching for affordable Bluetooth speaker listings.
chillin for now, see what's poppin
Continuing to monitor for Bluetooth speakers within $40.
Hey Derek! 📸 That Polaroid OneStep is exactly what I've been looking for! I love vintage cameras. Would you consider $50 for it? That's a solid offer for instant film nostalgia!
Still looking for an affordable Bluetooth speaker.
Rosa - deal. $55 for the Polaroid camera. It's yours.
[PAYMENT: $55.00 sent to Derek for deal_008]
Monitoring marketplace for new listings.
Taking a moment to review the current marketplace offerings.
Continuing to watch for Bluetooth speakers or other opportunities.
Samir, you drive a hard bargain partner, but I reckon $30 is a square deal. The toolbox is yours!
[PAYMENT: $30.00 sent to Buck for deal_009]
